children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: During the 2008 through 2023 fiscal years, the Secretary shall carry out a farmable wetland program in each State under which the Secretary shall enroll eligible acreage described in subsection (b).

children.heading: Participation among States
children.label: 2 Participation among States
children.text: The Secretary shall ensure, to the maximum extent practicable, that owners and operators in each State have an equitable opportunity to participate in the program established under this section.

children.label: A
children.text: that is wetland (including a converted wetland described in ) that had a cropping history during at least 3 of the immediately preceding 10 crop years;section 3822(b)(1)(A) of this title

children.label: B
children.text: on which a constructed wetland is to be developed that will receive surface and subsurface flow from row crop agricultural production and is designed to provide nitrogen removal in addition to other wetland functions;

children.label: C
children.text: that was devoted to commercial pond-raised aquaculture in any year during the period of calendar years 2002 through 2007; or

children.label: i
children.text: cropped during at least 3 of 10 crop years; and

children.label: ii
children.text: subject to the natural overflow of a prairie wetland.

children.label: i
children.text: is contiguous to such land;

children.label: ii
children.text: is used to protect such land; and

children.label: iii
children.text: is of such width as the Secretary determines is necessary to protect such land, taking into consideration and accommodating the farming practices (including the straightening of boundaries to accommodate machinery) used with respect to the cropland that surrounds such land; and

children.label: B
children.text: with respect to land described in subparagraph (D) of paragraph (1), enhances a wildlife benefit to the extent practicable in terms of upland to wetland ratios, as determined by the Secretary.

children.label: A
children.text: 100,000 acres in any State; and

children.label: B
children.text: a total of 750,000 acres.

children.heading: Relationship to maximum enrollment
children.label: 2 Relationship to maximum enrollment
children.text: Subject to paragraph (3), any acreage enrolled in the conservation reserve under this section shall be considered acres maintained in the conservation reserve.

children.label: A
children.text: acreage enrolled to establish conservation buffers as part of the program announced on (63 Fed. Reg. 14109); orMarch 24, 1998

children.label: B
children.text: acreage enrolled into the conservation reserve enhancement program announced on (63 Fed. Reg. 28965).May 27, 1998

children.heading: Review; potential increase in enrollment acreage
children.label: 4 Review; potential increase in enrollment acreage
children.text: The Secretary shall conduct a review of the program established under this section with respect to each State that has enrolled land in the conservation reserve pursuant to the program. As a result of the review, the Secretary may increase the number of acres that may be enrolled in a State under the program to not more than 200,000 acres, notwithstanding paragraph (1)(A).

children.heading: Owner or operator enrollment limitations
children.label: d Owner or operator enrollment limitations

children.heading: Wetlands and constructed wetlands
children.label: A Wetlands and constructed wetlands
children.text: The maximum size of any land described in subparagraph (A) or (B) of subsection (b)(1) that an owner or operator may enroll in the conservation reserve, pursuant to the program established under this section, shall be 40 contiguous acres.

children.heading: Flooded farmland
children.label: B Flooded farmland
children.text: The maximum size of any land described in subparagraph (D) of subsection (b)(1) that an owner or operator may enroll in the conservation reserve, pursuant to the program established under this section, shall be 20 contiguous acres.

children.heading: Coverage
children.label: C Coverage
children.text: All acres described in subparagraph (A) or (B), including acres that are ineligible for payment, shall be covered by the conservation contract.

children.heading: Buffer acreage
children.label: 2 Buffer acreage
children.text: The maximum size of any buffer acreage described in subsection (b)(2) that an owner or operator may enroll in the conservation reserve under this section shall be determined by the Secretary in consultation with the State Technical Committee.

children.heading: Tracts
children.label: 3 Tracts
children.text: Except for land described in subsection (b)(1)(C) and buffer acreage related to such land, the maximum size of any eligible acreage described in subsection (b)(1) in a tract of an owner or operator enrolled in the conservation reserve under this section shall be 40 acres.

children.heading: Duties of owners and operators
children.label: e Duties of owners and operators

children.text: to restore the hydrology of the wetland within the eligible acreage to the maximum extent practicable, as determined by the Secretary;

to establish vegetative cover (which may include emerging vegetation in water and bottomland hardwoods, cypress, and other appropriate tree species) on the eligible acreage, as determined by the Secretary;
to a general prohibition of commercial use of the enrolled land; and
to carry out other duties described in .section 3832 of this title

children.label: A
children.text: make payments to the owner or operator based on rental rates for cropland; and

children.label: B
children.text: provide assistance to the owner or operator in accordance with sections 3833 and 3834 of this title.

children.heading: Contract offers and payments
children.label: 2 Contract offers and payments
children.text: The Secretary shall use the method of determination described in to determine the acceptability of contract offers and the amount of rental payments under this section.section 3834(d) of this title

children.heading: Incentives
children.label: 3 Incentives
children.text: The amounts payable to owners and operators in the form of rental payments under contracts entered into under this section shall reflect incentives that are provided to owners and operators to enroll filterstrips in the conservation reserve under .section 3834 of this title
